attacking_style: Attacks on steepest climb sections (7-4km to go), often multiple times per ascent. Late-stage short accelerations (500m-4km) rather than long-range moves. Signature gradual draw-back tempo increases that predictably wear down opponents without explosive punch.
team_tactics: Sky/INEOS sets relentless high-altitude tempo with domestique trains (Poels, Castroviejo, Elissonde) to control entire climb before Froome's final acceleration. Team prioritizes front positioning on flat/technical stages for crash avoidance. Full squad mobilized for mechanical/crash recovery even mid-climb.
terrain_preference: High-altitude sustained climbs where diesel engine and pacing intelligence dominate. Strong in long time trials (40km+) using negative-split strategy. Struggles on extreme gradients (20%+ pitches like Zoncolan initially, Peyragudes) and technical descents where rivals neutralize or gain time.
vulnerability: Descending is documented weakness - lost time on technical descents, dropped on descent pace, crashed multiple stages consecutively. Post-2019 crash shows severe form deficit in time trials and sustained climbing. Extreme gradients expose lack of explosive acceleration. Next-day weakness after massive efforts (1:30+ losses following big attacks).
key_patterns: Crashes in early stages/positioning errors: Catalunya 2019 consecutive days, Tour 2018 Stage 1 heavy crash
Descending vulnerability recurring: dropped by Movistar descent pace 2021, lost time to Roche descending 2017
Post-2019 crash trajectory: massive time losses 2020-2021, first top-3 since crash at 2022 Tour signals slow recovery
Negative-split time trial pacing: 4th at first check, won at second check Vuelta 2017 TT
Late-tour durability: nearly won Tour Stage 20 TT 2018, Alpine form recovery 2022 third week
Struggles on extreme gradients immediately after TT efforts: dropped on 20%+ pitches day after Vuelta TT 2017
form_trajectory: positive: 2022 Tour showed first top-3 finish since June 2019 crash with unexpected third-week Alpine form recovery, marking potential end to 2020-2021 period where he couldn't follow domestiques and questioned Tour selection
